title: Sailing the Stormy Seas of AI
description: Delve into the reality of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and learn why skepticism is essential for its future impacts on business.
content:
Forecasts of AI’s future impacts must be viewed with skepticism, as AI and its promoters are adept at saying what we want to hear rather than telling us the discomfiting truth, as the truth might prompt us to turn AI off.

title: Chinese filing implies DeepSeek valuation of around $52 billion
description: Anhui Korrun's subsidiary invested 2.90 billion yuan in DeepSeek. This investment secured an indirect 0.8265% stake in the company. The deal implies the artificial intelligence startup was valued at 350.88 billion yuan. This stock-exchange filing offers rare public evidence of DeepSeek's fundraising. The low-profile company has never publicly announced or detailed this valuation.
